title: senegalia senegalensis
intro: Senegalia senegalensis, also known as Acacia senegal, is a thorny tree native to the savannas of West Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its gum arabic, which is obtained from the tree's sap and used as a natural adhesive, stabilizer, and emulsifier. The medicinal properties of Senegalia senegalensis include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing fever, improving digestion, and protecting against infections. Senegalia senegalensis is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which are traditionally consumed to promote overall health and well-being.
